title: Farm Animals Song for Toddlers | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
VROOM MOO! Benny's tractor rolls by the barn!
Sing a farm animals song for toddlers with cow, duck, sheep, and horse sounds.
Kids practice listening and repeating animal sounds in a bright cartoon.
Kid-safe American English nursery rhyme for preschool ages 2-8.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
